scripts.deploy:local: npm run build:lit && cd sn-sdk && now-sdk deploy --profile local && cd ../seismic-wrapper && snc ui-component deploy --profile local
scripts.deploy:pdi: npm run build:lit && cd sn-sdk && now-sdk deploy --profile pdi && cd ../seismic-wrapper && snc ui-component deploy --profile pdi
scripts.deploy:seismic:local: npm run build:lit && cd seismic-wrapper && SN_INSTANCE=http://localhost:8080 SN_USERNAME=admin SN_PASSWORD=admin snc ui-component build && SN_INSTANCE=http://localhost:8080 SN_USERNAME=admin SN_PASSWORD=admin snc ui-component deploy
scripts.deploy:seismic:pdi: npm run build:lit && cd seismic-wrapper && snc ui-component build && snc ui-component deploy
